label: 布尔并集
description: 将两个 shape 做布尔并集，追加 union(a,b) 到 Geometry DSL。何时用：把两个相交/相邻的实体合并成一个连续形体（而不是让它们各自为政或用一个大方块近似）。
description-en: Boolean union of two shapes, appending `union(a,b)` to the Geometry DSL. Use when: merging two overlapping/adjacent solids into one continuous body instead of approximating with one big primitive.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须同时含 a_id 与 b_id 两个形状）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; must already contain both the a_id and b_id shapes.

inputs.name: a_id
inputs.label: 形状 A id
inputs.description: 第一个形状 id；从上游 shape 的 id 输出端口连入，或填其 id 参数
inputs.description-en: Id of the first shape. Feed from an upstream shape's `id` output, or set/pass the shape's `id`.

inputs.name: b_id
inputs.label: 形状 B id
inputs.description: 第二个形状 id；同样来自上游某个 shape 的 id 输出
inputs.description-en: Id of the second shape. Also from an upstream shape's `id` output.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 union{n}
inputs.description-en: Custom id for this result; empty = auto union{n}.

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加 union 后的 Geometry

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行结果的 id（供下游引用）；引用失败时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the result line (for downstream refs). Empty string when refs failed.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: 引用错误时的原因（a_id/b_id 缺失或找不到）；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when a ref is bad (a_id/b_id missing or not found). Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
